DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONTRIBUTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO IDENTIFY A JOINT TORT ASSERTED/OR COULD BE ASSERTED BY THE OWNER AGAINST THE MASTER TENANT AND SUBTENANT FOR WHICH BOTH OF THEM MAY POTENTIALLY BECOME JUDGEMENT DEBTORS AT THE END OF THIS LITIGATION ARISING OUT OF THE FACTS ALLEGED IN THE OWNER'S CROSS-COMPLAINT. DEMURRER TO THE CONTRACT-BASED CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF WRITTEN CONTRACT, DUTY TO DEFEND AND DUTY TO INDEMNIFY IS OVERRULED. THESE CAUSES OF ACTION ARISE OUT OF AN INDEPENDENT CONTRACT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND BUNGALOW LIVING, AND NOT SOLELY OUT OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT/CO-DEFENDANT'S CROSS-COMPLAINT. E.G. SEE PARAGRAPH 20. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION IS OVERRULED. THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUFFICIENTLY STATED. BLANKENHELM V. E.F. HUTTON (1990) 217 CAL.APP.3D 1463 IS INAPPOSITE.
